verses.text: Guah zuloin khua keuna tawh kisai-in Topa in Jerusalem kiang-ah hih bangin a gen hi
“Judah gam kap a, a khuapite maimang dekdek hi. A mite in puan vom khu-in leilakah bok uh a, Jerusalem khua-a om mite' kahna aw ging hi
Uliante in a nasemte uh tuitawi dingin sawl uh a, tuikhuk a zuat uh leh tui na omlo hi. A beel hawm uh tawh hong kilehkik uh a, lungkhamin cihna ding theiloin a lu uh puan a khuh uh hi
Lokhote lungmang uh a, a lu uh puan a khuh uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh guah zulo ahih manin lei a keugawp hi
Lopa omlo lua ahih manin sazuk in gamlakah a no a nusia liang hi
Gam sakolte, bangmah omlohna mualtungah se-alte bangin a nak huhu uh hi. Lopa omlo ahih manin a hakzo kei uh hi

Ka mite in kei tungah, ‘ Topa aw, ka mawhna uh kote' langkhatah hong pang ahi ta zongin nangma min hangin kote hong hehpih in. Kote in tam veipi nang kong nungngat uh a, nangma tungah ka hong khial khinzo uh hi
Israel mite' lametpa aw, haksat hun ciangin ko a hong honkhiapa na hi hi. Bang hangin ka gamsung uhah khualmi bangin nang omin khualzin zan khat bek a taam bangin hong om na hi hiam

Bang hangin mi lungkiagawp bangin omin, a honkhia theilo galkappa bangin om na hi hiam? Ahih hangin Topa aw, kote' laizangah nang na om a, nangma minin kote hong kisam hi. Kote hong nusia kei in,’ hong ci uh hi,” hong ci hi

Hih mite tawh kisai-in Topa in thu gen a, “Kei kiang panin amaute vakkhia kawikawi nuam uh a, a kideek kei uh hi. Tua ahih manin Topa keimah in amaute ka sang kei a, a khialhnate uh phawkin, a mawhnate uh hangin gim ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in kei kiangah, “Hih mite in thupha a ngahna dingin thu hong ngen nawn kei in

An a tan' uh hangin amau' thumna ka ngai kei ding a, meihal biakna leh an tawh biaknate hong piak uh hangin ka sang kei ding hi. Amaute namsau tawh ahi zongin, kial tawh ahi zongin, pulnatna tawh ahi zongin ka sisakzaw ding hi,” hong ci hi

Tua ciangin keimah in, “Ah, Topa Pasian aw, en dih in. Kamsangte in amaute kiangah, ‘Note in namsau ahi zongin, kial ahi zongin na mukha ngei kei ding uh a, hih munah Pasian in lungnopna kip hong pia ding hi,’ a ci uh hi,” ka ci hi

Tua ciangin Topa in, “Tua kamsangte in kei' min suangin zuauthu hong gen uh hi. Amaute ka sawl kei a, thu ka pia kei a, zong ka hopih kei hi. Note kiangah hong gen uh thute a manlo maangmuhna, bangmahin a kimanglo aisanna, leh amau' ngaihsuttawm thute ahi hi

Tua ahih ciangin ka sawllohpi, ‘Hih gam sungah namsau ahi zongin, kial ahi zongin hong tunglo ding hi,’ ci-in keima min suangin thu a gen kamsangte tawh kisai-in Topa in ka cihin-ah, namsau leh kial tawh hih kamsangte a si khin ding uh hi

A hilh uh mite in zong kial leh namsau thuakin amaute-a kipan a zite uh, a tapate uh, leh a tanute uh Jerusalem khua kongzing lakah kipaithang ding a, kuamah in a vui kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amau' gitlohna amau' tung mahah ka buaksuk ding hi,” hong ci hi

Tua ciangin Topa in kei tungah thu hong gen a, “Jeremiah aw, amaute kiangah, ‘Sun leh zanin ka khitui luangluang hen la, kang ngei kei ta hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh keima mite in nakpi takin liamna thuak uh a, nakpi takin a kisat uh hi

Lolai-ah paikhia leng, namsau tawh a kithat mi bekbek ka mu a, khuapi sungah lut leng, kialin a puksite bekbek ka mu hi. Kamsangte leh siampite in koi-ah pai ding cih theilopi-in gamsungah an ngenin a vak kawikawi uh hi,’ ci-in va gen in,” hong ci hi

Topa aw, nangmah in Judah gam nialsiang khinzo na hi hiam? Zion khua kihhuai sa na hi hiam? Bang hangin kote liamna hong thuaksak a, hong damsak nawnlo na hi hiam? Lungnopna ka lamen uh a, hoihna bangmah a hong tung kei hi. Damna ding hun ka lamen uh a, lauhuaina bekbek ka mu uh hi
Topa aw, ka gitlohna uh leh ka pute ka pate uh gitlohnate ka hong pulak uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma tungah ka hong mawh khin uh hi
Nangma min na khualna-in kote hong nolh kei in la, a vanglian na tokhom mindaisak kei ta in. Kote tawh nong thuciamna hong phawk in la, hong ciampel kei ta in

Gamdang pasian zuaute' lakah guah a zusak thei om ahi hiam? Tua ahih kei leh zong vantung mi in ama thu-in guah zu tawmsak thei ahi hiam? Tua bang a hih thei nang bek hilo na hi hiam? Topa kote' Pasian aw, nangmah in tuate khempeuh hih na hih manin nangma sungah lametna kong nei uh hi.
